case_title: M. MING QUAN VS. DE SHENG ZHANG ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF QUAN, M. MING AS TO DEFENDANT NIAN, MIAO FENG YUEN, SCOTT
COPYING FEES (2 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF QUAN, M. MING

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QUAN, M. MING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZHANG, DE SHENG $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,105.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS TRANSFER TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
ORDER ON (SC-108)REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAIMS). THE REQUEST IS: DENIED. (SC-108 REQUEST TO INCREASE JUDGMENT AMOUNT FROM $2105 TO AT LEAST $4950)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR DEC-03-2015 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT QUAN, M. MING RECOVER FROM APPELLANT ZHANG, DE SHENG $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,105.00 DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF DEC-03-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-03-2015 BY PRO TEM JUDGE ELLIOTT MYLES; THE APPELLANT APPEARS. THE THE RESPONDENT APPEARS WITH MANDARIN LANGUAGE INTERPRETER BANNIE CHOW, CA STATE CERTIFICATION #100364. PRO TEM JUDGE ELLIOTT MYLES; CLERK M.L. MANZELLA; EXHIITS RETAINED BY COURT; NOT REPORTED (D-525).

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-27-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-27-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-27-2015 - JUDGMENT.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DE SHENG ZHANG IS GRANTED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. DEFENDANT DE SHENG ZHANG WAS NOT PRESENT BUT WAS REPRESENTED BY HIS WIFE--MIA FENG NIAN. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY MANDRIN INTERPRETER---HWA SHING (SHANNON KWEI). THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
